folders.description:
# Core Module

This module contains core functionality that is loaded once when the application starts.

## Purpose
- Core application services
- Application-wide models and interfaces
- Core utilities and constants

# Core Services

This directory contains singleton services that are used throughout the application.

## Purpose
- Authentication service
- HTTP service
- Logging service
- Other application-wide services

# Guards

This directory contains route guards for protecting routes and controlling access.

## Purpose
- Authentication guards
- Role-based access guards
- Feature flags guards
- Other route protection mechanisms

# Interceptors

This directory contains HTTP interceptors for request/response manipulation.

## Purpose
- Authentication token interceptor
- Error handling interceptor
- Logging interceptor
- Request/response transformation

# Core Models

This directory contains application-wide models and interfaces.

## Purpose
- Base interfaces
- Common types
- Shared models
- Core DTOs

# Shared Module

This module contains reusable components, directives, and pipes used across the application.

## Purpose
- Shared UI components
- Common directives and pipes
- Shared utilities
- Reusable services

# Shared Directives

This directory contains custom directives used across the application.

## Purpose
- Custom structural directives
- Attribute directives
- Form validation directives
- UI enhancement directives

# Shared Components

This directory contains reusable UI components.

## Purpose
- Common UI elements
- Form components
- Layout components
- Reusable widgets

# Shared Pipes

This directory contains custom pipes for data transformation.

## Purpose
- Data formatting pipes
- Filter pipes
- Custom transformation pipes
- Utility pipes

# Features Module

This directory contains feature modules that implement specific business functionality.

## Purpose
- Feature-specific components
- Feature services
- Feature routing
- Feature-specific models

# Layouts Module

This directory contains layout components that define the application structure.

## Purpose
- Main layout components
- Header and footer
- Navigation
- Responsive layouts

# Store Module

This directory contains state management related files.

## Purpose
- State definitions
- Store configuration
- Store utilities
- State management setup

# Store Actions

This directory contains state management actions.

## Purpose
- Action creators
- Action types
- Action interfaces
- Action payloads

# Store Reducers

This directory contains state reducers.

## Purpose
- State reducers
- Reducer interfaces
- State slices
- Reducer utilities

# Store Effects

This directory contains side effects for state management.

## Purpose
- API calls
- Side effects
- Effect handlers
- Effect utilities

# Configuration

This directory contains application configuration files.

## Purpose
- App configuration
- Feature flags
- Constants
- Configuration utilities

# Assets

This directory contains static assets used in the application.

## Purpose
- Images
- Icons
- Fonts
- Other static files

# Environments

This directory contains environment-specific configuration.

## Purpose
- Development settings
- Production settings
- Staging settings
- Environment variables

# Styles

This directory contains global styles and theme configurations.

## Purpose
- Global CSS
- Theme variables
- Style utilities
- Custom styles

# Testing

This directory contains test utilities and mock data.

## Purpose
- Test utilities
- Mock services
- Test helpers
- Testing configurations

# Internationalization

This directory contains translation files and i18n configurations.

## Purpose
- Translation files
- Language configurations
- i18n utilities
- Locale data
